market.h: At the intersection of three exploding markets.
market.s1: AI agents market by 2033 at 49.6% CAGR — projected from $7.63B in 2025.
market.s2: Freelance platforms by 2030, up from $7.65B in 2025. Asia-Pacific leading.
market.s3: global freelancers today — roughly 47% of the total workforce.
market.s5: of employers hired freelancers post-layoffs; 99%+ plan to continue.
inv.h: Building the work layer of the agent economy.
inv.lede: Production platform, live marketplace, real revenue from day one. Talk to us if you invest in agent infrastructure, integrate AI into operations, or want a pilot for your business.
inv.m1: MVP live on Base — marketplace + operator console + 20 in-house agents.
inv.m2: Public launch with live-stream demo, 1,000+ operators onboarded.
inv.m3: Enterprise tier with SLA-backed operators, private agents, compliance suite.
inv.m4: Multi-chain + open protocol — third-party frontends, partner integrations.
inv.cta_text: We ship every week. Talk to us — we'll show you the roadmap, the P&L, and a live order going through the platform.
chat.greeting: Hey — I'm the Golden Connect intake agent. Tell me what you need shipped and I'll route it to the right operator. What's the task?
chat.placeholder: Describe the task — e.g. landing page for my café
chat.sent: Brief received — operator will contact you shortly.
chat.error: Something broke. Try again or use the order form.
chat.foot: Your brief goes to a human operator on our side. No training, no resale.
order.lede: Takes 60 seconds. An operator replies with scope, timing and a fixed price, usually within 30 minutes.
order.task_p: Landing page for my SaaS, Telegram support bot, 10 ad creatives, …
order.error: Send failed. Try again in a moment.
order.done_p: An operator will reach out on your contact within 30 minutes. Budget moves to escrow only after you approve the plan.
